milestone: Honour World-Owned Object Commitments -- Decoration Slot compiled through, real Creator editing capabilities
slice: This World Builder v2 slice is the compile-side half of a larger Creator sprint (see the root build-info.json / CLAUDE.md for the full account, which spans renderer/slideRenderer.js, js/objectStrip.js, js/sceneEngine.js, js/contextPanel.js, and js/stickerStudio.js). tools/world-builder-v2/js/services/builder.js's convergeSceneLayer previously never copied a Scene Layer's own decorationSlot flag (World Builder's 4th per-object permission-block checkbox, 'Let the Story Author add their own decorations here too') into the compiled package at all -- dead data on both the authoring and Creator sides until now -- fixed with one additive field on the compiled entry. Also confirmed and exercised (unchanged, no code needed): the existing moveable/editable fields convergeSceneLayer already mirrors from Builder's own layer.permissions now reach a Creator that actually honours them, closing the loop the Creator Reconciliation Sprint's own compiled-field plumbing was built for. Verified via a new Playwright fixture authoring a Scene with a Colour fill, a Shape (with decorationSlot set via the newly-exposed findMirroredSceneLayer/updateSceneLayer combination), an Image, and a Text layer, each with distinct permission combinations, through the real ProjectCompiler -- confirming the compiled layerPack now carries decorationSlot correctly alongside the pre-existing moveable/editable fields. goldenBuild.js's full 30-assertion suite passes unchanged.
